scene_title: Figura encoberta observando tela de codigo
narrative_beat: Arquiteto oculto de negro e carmesim de costas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid cloaked hooded figure in dark black and crimson mantle standing back to viewer observing golden glowing code screen as hidden architect with crimson flames surrounding in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the hooded figure's back and the golden glowing code screen being observed
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated server corridor with blinking grey lights in background
props: hooded figure in dark black and crimson

environment.location: server corridor of a major tech company

composition.foreground: figure and screen in vivid black crimson gold

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, gold screen highlights

mood.emotion: the hidden architect building for nineteen centuries what finally works

symbolism.primary: the cloaked figure as anonymous tech leadership
symbolism.secondary: golden code screen as the Revelation text being executed line by line

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only
